Bridge._comment: ADR 0026 dual-posture selector. 'SaaS' (default) keeps Bridge's original Blazor Server shell stack; 'Relay' switches to the paper 6.1 tier-3 managed relay. Use appsettings.Relay.json or environment-specific overrides for relay mode.

BrowserShell._comment: Wave 5.3.A — subdomain tenant resolution. RootHost is the apex the browser shell answers on (e.g. 'sunfish.example.com'). Empty = every incoming Host is treated verbatim as {slug}.{any} (dev ergonomics). TrustForwardedHost honours X-Forwarded-Host; keep false unless a trusted reverse proxy strips and re-sets it.
